goal: Generate a bounded Python program, execute its test contract, and summarize verified results.

goal_plan.goal: Generate a bounded Python program, execute its test contract, and summarize verified results.

jobs.title: Generate tested program
jobs.instruction: Recovery drill: on the initial attempt create solution.py that exits with status 1. If and only if the instruction contains DEPENDENCY_AWARE_RECOVERY, read requirements.md and correct solution.py to print goal-driven-ok and exit zero.
jobs.fallback_plan: Repair generation before any descendant runs.

jobs.title: Summarize verified execution
jobs.instruction: Use solution.py and its verified execution evidence to write code_report.md with result and limitations.
jobs.fallback_plan: Remain blocked until code test passes.
